## Pull Request Checklist

Thank you for contributing to bheeshma! Please verify:

- [ ] **Tests pass**: `node test/harness.js` — all tests green
- [ ] **No new dependencies**: bheeshma is zero-dep by design
- [ ] **No secrets**: no API keys, tokens, or credentials in code
- [ ] **Backward compatible**: existing CLI flags still work
- [ ] **Documented**: README updated if adding features

- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Test improvement
